div.head: 124. Editorial Note
div.p: On June 5, Elim O’Shaughnessy called on Chancellor Adenauer to discuss European security, but before he was able to present the United States view, the Chancellor “launched into a long tirade” against a paper which had been submitted by Harold Stassen to the United Nations Disarmament Subcommittee. For O’Shaughnessy’s report on this meeting and related documentation, see volume XX, pages 604 ff.
